channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Police credit a good Samaritan for ending a deadly shooting at a Rhode Island ice rink
item.description: A gunman who opened fire at a Rhode Island youth hockey game, killing two adults and injuring three others, was stopped after a spectator intervened.

item.title: 4 dead in crash on Colorado highway involving dozens of vehicles, police say
item.description: The Colorado State Patrol says four people were killed in a crash on I-25 south of Pueblo involving at least 30 vehicles during what are being called ...

item.title: 4 dead in pile-up crash involving over 30 vehicles, including multiple semis: Police
item.description: The incident occurred around 10 a.m. local time on southbound I-25, about 40 miles south of Colorado Springs, authorities said.

item.title: WATCH: Late Rev. Jesse Jackson remembered by Rev. Al Sharpton at news conference
item.description: Rev. Al Sharpton held a news conference on the late Rev. Jesse Jackson after the civil rights leader died on Tuesday morning at the age of 84, his fam...

item.title: WATCH: Figure skater Isabeau Levito talks about hitting the ice in Milan
item.description: The American figure skater, who will participate in the women's single skating finals on Tuesday, talked to ABC News' Maggie Rulli about her Olympic j...

item.title: Minnesota’s Legislature braces for a federal immigration fight as the enforcement surge winds down
How much interest will a $40,000 savings account earn in 2026 (and which accounts can earn more)?
item.description: Interest earnings on a $40,000 traditional savings account will be minimal this year, but it isn't the only option.

item.title: Stephen Colbert slams CBS, says network blocked James Talarico interview
item.description: "The Late Show" host Stephen Colbert criticized CBS on Monday night, saying the network blocked his interview with U.S. Senate hopeful James Talarico ...

item.title: 20% of U.S. jobs are highly vulnerable to automation, economists say
item.description: More than half of jobs in manufacturing and transportation could be automated over the next 20 years, according to Oxford Economics.

item.title: WATCH: Florida man rescues mom, 3 kids from canal, reunited one week later
item.description: Casey Curtis pulled a family from a submerged SUV in Indiantown. One week later, he met them again as they thanked their hero.

item.title: The Rev. Jesse Jackson, who led the Civil Rights Movement for decades after King, has died at 84
'I am somebody': Tributes pour in for Rev. Jesse Jackson after his death
item.description: Rev. Al Sharpton invoked the late Rev. Jesse Jackson's slogan, “I am somebody,” which Jackson famously recited in an iconic 1971 chant with children o...

item.title: Trump blames D.C., Maryland and Virginia for massive Potomac River sewage spill
item.description: President Trump and Maryland Gov. Wes Moore feud over who bears responsibility for addressing one of the largest sewage spills in U.S. history.
